title: Persons subject to proceedings
doc_html:
Art. 1005.  Persons subject to proceedings

Any parent may be subject to proceedings under this Title and shall have juridical capacity for such proceedings regardless of age or matrimonial status.

Acts 1991, No. 235, §10, eff. Jan. 1, 1992.
